overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt trail through open prairies at dawn. The scene features heavy overcast skies, scattered oak trees lining the path, and a brief encounter with other riders on horseback in an atmospheric western landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy prairie trail with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the grassy field with scattered trees on both sides

entered.detail: tall oak trees with dense foliage lining the left side of the trail
winding dirt path cutting through the grassy prairie
rolling green grass covering the prairie hills
dark heavy cloud cover hanging low on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open prairie at dawn, with scattered oak trees lining both sides of the path. The overcast sky creates a moody, diffused light over the grassy landscape, and the terrain gently rolls into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with fence line and distant horizon

events.description: two riders on horseback pass by on the left side of the trail, moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as other riders pass by on the left, then proceeding through more open grassland

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback passing by on the left side of the trail

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts running parallel to the trail on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the landscape opens up to reveal more sky, two riders on horseback briefly pass by on the left. The trail continues through increasingly open prairie, with wooden fence posts now visible along the right side and distant hills emerging on the horizon under the stormy dawn sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from a sheltered, tree-lined path into a vast, open prairie at dawn. It begins with the character walking through a moody landscape of scattered oak trees under a diffused, overcast sky. As the terrain gently rolls and the canopy thins, the scene opens up to reveal a wider expanse of sky and distant hills emerging on the horizon. The camera then captures two riders on horseback passing by on the left as the trail expands, with wooden fence posts appearing along the right side. Finally, the view settles on the increasingly open prairie under a stormy dawn light.
